rls_policies.qual: has_role(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), 'admin'::app_role)

rls_policies.with_check: (has_role(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), 'admin'::app_role) OR (( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid) = user_id))

rls_policies.policyname: Users can update profiles based on permissions
rls_policies.qual: can_manage_user(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), user_id)
rls_policies.with_check: can_manage_user(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), user_id)

rls_policies.qual:
((tenant_id IN ( SELECT profiles.tenant_id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.user_id = ( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid)))) OR (has_role(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), 'admin'::app_role) AND (tenant_id = ( SELECT profiles.tenant_id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.user_id = ( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid))))))

rls_policies.with_check:
((tenant_id IN ( SELECT profiles.tenant_id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.user_id = ( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid)))) OR (has_role(( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid), 'admin'::app_role) AND (tenant_id = ( SELECT profiles.tenant_id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.user_id = ( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid))))))
